Trust Scores

Payment Routing

Trust-Gated Payment Flows

Smart contracts make encrypted decisions on encrypted data. Payment routing happens entirely within FHE — nobody learns the trust scores.

Instant Transfer

HIGH TRUST (75-100)

Verified employees receive encrypted cUSDC immediately. No delays, no friction.

EmployerInstantEmployee

24h Delayed Release

MEDIUM TRUST (40-74)

Building trust takes time. Payments held for 24 hours before release.

Employer24h HoldEmployee

Escrow with Approval

LOW TRUST (0-39)

New relationships start carefully. Funds held in escrow until milestones are met.

EmployerEscrowEmployee
Workflow

How It Works

01

Wrap

Employer wraps USDC into confidential cUSDC

02

Score

Trust scores encrypted and stored on-chain via FHE

03

Pay

Batch payroll routes payments by encrypted trust tiers

04

Claim

Employees decrypt and claim their confidential salary

Open Demo

Try It Yourself

No permissions needed. Anyone can register as an employer and run the full payroll flow on Sepolia testnet.

1

Register

Connect your wallet and register as an employer with a single transaction.

2

Get Test Tokens

Mint 10,000 cPAY test tokens from the built-in faucet to fund your payroll.

3

Run Payroll

Add employees, set trust scores, and execute encrypted payroll -- all on-chain.

Ready to try confidential payroll?

Register as employer, get test tokens, and run trust-gated payroll in minutes.
